principle: Capabilities are abstract abilities. Model instances implement capabilities with different quality, cost, latency and safety constraints.

capabilities.name: 通用对话
capabilities.description: General conversational response generation with system, developer and user instructions.

capabilities.name: 复杂推理
capabilities.description: Multi-step reasoning, planning, decomposition and self-checking. Reasoning state must be controlled separately from visible output.

capabilities.name: 长上下文
capabilities.description: Long document and project context handling with truncation, summarization and retrieval support.

capabilities.name: 图片理解
capabilities.description: Image input understanding, OCR-like reading, visual QA and character/style inspection.

capabilities.name: 视频理解
capabilities.description: Video input understanding, scene segmentation, shot analysis, temporal reasoning and subtitle alignment.

capabilities.name: 图片生成
capabilities.description: Image generation or image editing through provider adapters.

capabilities.name: 视频生成
capabilities.description: Text-to-video, image-to-video and video editing provider routing.

capabilities.name: 语音识别
capabilities.description: Speech-to-text, subtitle generation and speaker-aware transcription.

capabilities.name: 语音合成
capabilities.description: Text-to-speech, role voice generation and dubbing provider routing.

capabilities.name: 工具调用
capabilities.description: Structured tool/function calling with permission, schema and audit controls.

capabilities.name: Skills 运行时
capabilities.description: Skill registry, skill invocation and skill lifecycle integration.

capabilities.name: MCP 运行时
capabilities.description: MCP tool/resource/prompt mapping with credential isolation and approval rules.

capabilities.name: 记忆检索
capabilities.description: Search session, user, project and task memory with permission and retention rules.

capabilities.name: 记忆写入
capabilities.description: Write structured memory items with scope, TTL, tags and sensitivity metadata.

capabilities.name: 规则评估
capabilities.description: Evaluate routing, budget, region, provider, tool and approval rules.

capabilities.name: Agent 编排
capabilities.description: Run multi-step agent workflows with state, tool calls, approvals and resume/cancel/retry.

capabilities.name: 文本向量
capabilities.description: Generate text embeddings for RAG, memory and semantic search.

capabilities.name: 短剧/漫剧故事推理
capabilities.description: Story structure, character motivation, conflict, reversal, episode hook and audience retention reasoning.

capabilities.name: 短剧/漫剧视觉规划
capabilities.description: Character bible, scene bible, storyboard, shot plan and visual prompt planning for AI short drama/comic production.
